title: Time & Space Complexity
story_hook: Google searches 1 billion records in 0.001 sec because of Big O. Today you learn the language of FAANG interviewers.

content.story: Google searches 1 billion records in 0.001 sec because of Big O. Today you learn the language of FAANG interviewers.

content.title: Time Complexity 2026
content.focus_note: Watch how loop counts translate to Big O.

content.doc_md:
Big O measures growth: O(1), O(n), O(n^2), O(log n).

Time vs space trade-offs explained with examples.

visualizer.task: Compare O(n) vs O(n^2) growth live.
visualizer.notes: See how small input changes explode runtime.

practice_problems.prompt: Calculate complexity of a single loop.
Calculate complexity of a loop that halves n.
Calculate complexity of two consecutive loops.
Calculate complexity of recursion with one call.

quiz_questions.question: Which is faster for large n?
quiz_questions.explanation: Lower growth rate wins for large inputs.

quiz_questions.question: A loop that halves n each time is
Big O describes
quiz_questions.explanation: Big O measures how runtime grows with input size.

content.task_prompt: Analyze the time complexity of two solutions: one with nested loops and one with a hash map.

recall_questions: Why does Big O matter in interviews?
How can extra memory reduce time?
content.identity_affirmation: You can now speak the language of efficiency.
content.streak_reminder: Space complexity is next - keep the streak alive.
